seoTitle: McKellar vs Melba — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between McKellar and Melba. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in McKellar and Melba.
heading: McKellar vs Melba — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between McKellar, Australian Capital Territory and Melba, Australian Capital Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: McKellar has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Melba (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is McKellar or Melba safer from flooding?
faq.answer: McKellar has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Melba scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: McKellar scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Melba scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in McKellar or Melba?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. McKellar has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
